info.title: SDKWork BirdCoder Coding Server API
info.description: OpenAPI 3.1 schema generated from the live BirdCoder unified same-port API gateway.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: SDKWork IAM authentication and session resources.

tags.name: collaboration
tags.description: Workspace collaboration and team catalog resources.

tags.name: commerce
tags.description: Commerce membership, package catalog, entitlement, order, and payment resources.

tags.name: iam
tags.description: IAM user, tenant, organization, role, permission, policy, and audit resources.

tags.name: intelligence
tags.description: Coding session, checkpoint, approval, and question resources.

tags.name: platform
tags.description: Workspace, project, release, deployment, and delivery resources.

tags.name: runtime
tags.description: Runtime engine, model, native session, and local operation resources.

tags.name: skills
tags.description: Skill package catalog and installation resources.

tags.name: system
tags.description: System descriptor, health, route catalog, and runtime metadata resources.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

sortTimestamp.description: Normalized activity timestamp in epoch milliseconds used for sorting.

transcriptUpdatedAt.description: Most recent transcript mutation timestamp, when available.

sequence.description: Event sequence number serialized as an exact decimal string.

sortTimestamp.description: Normalized activity timestamp in epoch milliseconds used for sorting.

transcriptUpdatedAt.description: Most recent transcript mutation timestamp, when available.

discoveryMode.description: Discovery mode for native engine session inventory.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Values are sanitized by the runtime boundary.

topP.description: Nucleus sampling value. Values are sanitized by the runtime boundary.

stream.description: Whether the turn should stream message.delta events. Defaults to true.

usageLimit.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

status.description: Known values include active and archived.

category.description: Known values include community, saas, and mine.

status.description: Known values include active and archived.

environmentKey.description: Known values include dev, test, staging, and prod.

runtime.description: Known values include web, desktop, server, container, and kubernetes.

releaseKind.description: Known values include formal, canary, hotfix, rollback.

status.description: Known values include pending, ready, running, succeeded, failed, rolled_back.

get.description: Get coding session. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

404.description: Coding session was not found.

500.description: Coding session summary could not be read.

delete.description: Delete coding session. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

404.description: Coding session was not found.

500.description: Coding session could not be deleted.

400.description: Coding session update request is invalid.

404.description: Coding session was not found.

500.description: Coding session could not be updated.

get.description: List coding sessions. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single workspace.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single project.

parameters.name: engineId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single code engine.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based starting offset used for incremental loading.

500.description: Unified coding session inventory could not be read.
